name: zalo-shope
description: Multi-store Zalo commerce foundation for Vietnam

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm --parallel --filter "./apps/**" run dev
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d --wait postgres redis minio && docker compose run --rm minio-init
scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm run build:packages && dotenv -e .env.test.example -- corepack pnpm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:run: corepack pnpm --filter @zalo-shop/database migrate:deploy && corepack pnpm --filter @zalo-shop/database seed && playwright test
scripts.test:integration: corepack pnpm run build:packages && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:readiness:storage: corepack pnpm run build:packages && tsx tests/readiness/storage-preflight.ts
scripts.test:unit: corepack pnpm run build:packages && vitest run --config vitest.unit.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm --recursive --filter "./apps/**" run typecheck && corepack pnpm run typecheck:readiness
scripts.typecheck:readiness: tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node tests/migration/m2-upgrade.ts tests/readiness/http-baseline.ts tests/readiness/storage-preflight.ts tests/readiness/readiness-safety.spec.ts
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test:unit && corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run db:validate
